_comment: git-branch.json (schema v2, product-wise) — the base/integration branch each repo derives feature branches from.
Lives at <pool-root>/config/git-branch.json. NOT a git repo — each developer's local copy; user-maintained.
GROUPS: `shared` = repos used by >1 product (per shared-ai-brain consumer-registry); `EFP`/`RMS`/`ATLAS` = product-exclusive repos.
One clone per repo in the pool => one branch per repo. A repo must appear in exactly ONE group;
if it appears in several with different branches, tooling warns and the first match wins (order: shared, EFP, RMS, ATLAS).
USED BY: (1) /sync-repos — checks out the mapped branch and `git pull`s it; (2) /implement — derives ai/<KEY>-<slug> from it.
LOOKUP: mapped branch wins; unmapped repos fall back to `fallback_branches` in order (first that exists on origin).
AI-brains + tooling repos (freightify-ai-workflow, ff-cursor-marketplace) are never synced and intentionally omitted.
Legacy flat schema ({"repositories": {...}}) is still accepted by all tooling.
